summary: PiD upscale completes but Cue lane never drains — settle(DONE) no-op because the store job was already 'cancelled' when real output landed; lane intent (_lanes.active) strands -> phantom '1 RUNNING'. Filed from MPI-208 inbox msg 6d4e3f09 + reply 0c4d4f48. Needs live store phase-trace to pin who pre-cancelled it. Do NOT make cancelled->done legal.

todo->doing (validating). Root cause found: intent-lane (_laneOf keys on forceLocal) vs store-lane (keys on resolved engine) mismatch -> no-Pod local gen parks intent on 'remote' but store job runs on 'local' -> drain fires wrong loop callback -> phantom '1 RUNNING'. Original pre-cancel hypothesis disproven by trace agent.

Fix shipped (logic-verified): _laneOf now mirrors the store's engine->lane rule (forceLocal? 'local' : isRemote()?'remote':'local'). New guard tests/lane-agreement.test.cjs asserts both rules agree across (forceLocal x isRemote). store 20/20 + parse + eslint clean. Live user-ux repro deferred: no-Pod local gen must drain the Cue clean on completion. Residual async-gap + async-refresh edges deferred (narrow).

doing/validating -> done/complete (status accepted). Fix LIVE-VERIFIED by user: no-Pod local gen now drains the Cue clean on completion (was phantom '1 RUNNING'). Lane-key mismatch fixed in _laneOf + lane-agreement.test.cjs guard.
